- Fission recoil method: fission foils of 100 micro-
grams per sq-cm 241Am within a diameter of 9.5-mm

separated from fission foils by stainless steel
Both assemblies sealed inside copper cans and placed in
then averaged over each run. Fission yields calculated
by requiring unit total yield in each half of the mass
